title_header: The Blood of the Butterfly Story/Art: Remin Episode 4: The Truth

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Hehe, isn't it pretty here?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Haha. It's rare to see so many plants in one place nowadays.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I can't get over how beautiful it is, even though I see it every day. It's a tough job, but the work environment couldn't be better.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Yeah, it's pretty.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Right now, we're in the First Lab. Starting with the Central Garden in the middle. The First Lab is on the left, and the Guard Room and Second Lab are on the right. The Butterfly Pavilion (Dormitory), the Dead Butterfly Goddess's body, and the office of Doctor Yujin Seo, the current director of the Garden, are both located in the Central Garden. But you can't enter the Central Garden without special permission. You probably won't need to go there anyway. If you continue past the Central Garden, you'll find the Second Lab.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Uh... I think they're looking at me. Don't they have work to do?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Ah, sorry. Did that make you uncomfortable? Please understand, everyone has been really excited and curious since they heard about the newest Butterfly. Oh, we thought that the third Butterfly would be the last one, but then you suddenly appeared, the Fourth Butterfly. Everyone was so surprised, myself included. Everyone in the Garden is talking about it now!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: You said I'm the fourth one, right?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Hmm? You called me the Fourth Butterfly, so you're saying I'm one of those Butterfly Kids who go around fighting bugs and rescuing people?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Yup.

dialogue.speaker: KIONI
dialogue.line: It's hard to believe, isn't it? I can see why, you've lived such a normal life until now.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: But it doesn't make any sense. All the Butterfly Kids have different colored blood, but my blood is red like everyone else's. Besides, if I'm a Butterfly, why was I the only one living outside the Garden? I thought Butterflies were all born and raised in the Garden. And another thing, did Huina know the truth about me the whole time?

dialogue.speaker: SICHA
dialogue.line: I get it; all of this must be very confusing for you. But it's all true. That power that we saw in you proves it. You're definitely the Fourth Butterfly. You're just a Butterfly with red blood. That's what made you so hard to find. Also, you said that you don't remember anything before you were 13.

dialogue.speaker: KIONI
dialogue.line: What? This is your first time seeing the Garden? But you must have grown up here! That's impossible! What do you mean? I don't remember anything before I was 13.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Yeah, that's right. But my sister said that's because I was in a car accident when I was little--

dialogue.speaker: SICHA
dialogue.line: That's a lie.

dialogue.speaker: SICHA
dialogue.line: No one knew about the existence of the Fourth Butterfly. I'm a Butterfly myself, and even I didn't know until recently. Even in the Garden, only a small number of researchers knew about the Fourth Butterfly. But seven years ago, one of those researchers betrayed the Garden, snuck the Fourth Butterfly out of here, escaped, and went into hiding. And that researcher was... Huina Baek, the one you call your older sister.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: What?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: That's ridiculous! She would never--

dialogue.speaker: SICHA
dialogue.line: She had her own reasons for erasing your memories after you escaped. As a researcher in the Garden, it would've been easy for her to get her hands on a drug to erase your memories. She disguised herself and pretended to be a normal person. Did you really think a Butterfly could ever leave the Garden? It's amazing that she managed to keep you hidden from the Garden for seven years.

dialogue.speaker: SICHA
dialogue.line: Your sister lied to you. About everything.

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWA
dialogue.line: Jayeong! Don't be so insensitive! Think about how shocking all of this must be for him!

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: What's the big deal? I just told him the truth.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I see.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: But why did Huina escape with me? Why would she take a risk like that?

dialogue.speaker: SICHA
dialogue.line: Hmm, we're not sure about that either. Maybe she wanted you to avoid living as a Butterfly. Even now, there are a lot of human rights issues surrounding the Butterfly Kids. Some people feel that we shouldn't be making young children do such cruel work. She might have just wanted you to have a normal life.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Maybe. Is that what Huina wanted? To get me out of here? But somehow I've ended up here again.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Well... I guess I really am alone now. Huina was all I had.

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWA
dialogue.line: Ah, don't worry! I know this is a lot to take in at once! This place and everyone around you might seem completely unfamiliar to you now. But we'll do our best to protect you and help you adjust to your new life as a Butterfly! So don't think you are alone! From now on, this will become your new home!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Home?

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWA
dialogue.line: Anyway, let me know if you have any questions!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Well, there is something I'd like to know.

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWA
dialogue.line: Sure!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Now that I've become the Fourth Butterfly, like the First Butterfly over there... if I use this blood to kill Duo and save people, would that alone be enough to get people to like me?

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWA
dialogue.line: Huh?! Uh... O-of course! A-absolutely! Y-yeah! Now that you're a Butterfly, you'll be on TV and people will see you as a hero! I-I'm sure everyone will love you! We're all in a difficult situation, so-- uh... huh?!

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWA
dialogue.line: J-Jayeong? What's wrong? Where are you going?

dialogue.speaker: JAYEONG
dialogue.line: Let go of me, or... I'll hit you too.

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWA
dialogue.line: What?!

summary: The protagonist learns he is the "Fourth Butterfly" and that his sister, Huina, lied about his past, having erased his memories and hidden him from the Garden for seven years. Confused and feeling alone, he questions his new identity and asks if becoming a hero will make people like him, leading to a tense moment with Jayeong.
